title: Choose Your YouTube Niche in 30 Minutes -  Most Creators Take 3 Years
description:
Most creators YouTube ya Instagram pe fail content ki wajah se nahi…
balki WRONG NICHE choose karne ki wajah se hote hain.

Aaj social media pe competition itna zyada badh chuka hai ki agar tum bina strategy ke content banaoge, toh consistent rehne ke baad bhi growth nahi aayegi.

Is video mein main tumhe ek simple 3-step framework dunga jisse tum apna perfect YouTube/Instagram niche choose kar sakte ho — bina months waste kiye.

Is video mein tum seekhoge:
✔️ Passion vs Profit — kya actually matter karta hai
✔️ Kyun single niche strategy aaj ke YouTube pe weak ho rahi hai
✔️ Powerful “3 Niche Combo Rule”
✔️ Crowded niche mein bhi unique kaise stand out kare
✔️ Successful creators actually kaise grow karte hain
✔️ Aur kyun zyada tar log kabhi start hi nahi karte

Agar tum in situations mein ho:
— Videos upload kar rahe ho lekin views 100 se upar nahi jaate
— Months se perfect niche dhoondh rahe ho aur start nahi kar paa rahe
— Instagram ya YouTube pe consistent hone ke baad bhi growth nahi aa rahi
— Doosre creators grow kar rahe hain aur tumhara channel/page stuck pada hai

…toh yeh video tumhari thinking completely change kar sakta hai.

Sach yeh hai:
Perfect niche milta nahi hai… banaya jaata hai.

Niche clarity action lene se aati hai — sirf research karte rehne se nahi.

📌 Neeche comment karke apne 3 interests batao
Main personally reply karke bataunga ki tumhara best niche combination kya ho sakta hai 🚀

title: How to Record Mic Quality Voice on Mobile ( Pro Tips! )
description:
In this video, I show you how to record studio-quality voice using only your phone – no external mic needed.

If your mobile recordings sound noisy or unclear, this complete step-by-step guide will help you get clean professional audio at home using simple techniques + free AI tools.

I cover everything from:

✔ Proper room setup for voice recording
✔ Correct mobile mic distance
✔ Phone stability while recording
✔ Breathing technique for clean audio
✔ Multiple takes workflow
✔ Noise reduction basics
✔ How to enhance voice using FREE AI
✔ Final audio adjustment using BandLab

This tutorial is perfect for:

🎤 YouTubers
🎤 Content creators
🎤 Voiceover artists
🎤 Reel / Shorts creators
🎤 Podcast beginners

No expensive mic.
No studio.
Just your phone + correct technique.

🔥 FREE AI VOICE ENHANCEMENT WEBSITE (Used in Video)

Use this website to clean + enhance your recorded voice:

👉 https://myedit.online/en/audio-editor

Steps:

Open the website

Login

Go to Audio → Speech Enhancement

Upload your recorded voice

Download enhanced audio

(Free version allows limited downloads per day.)

🎛 BANDLAB FINAL VOICE ADJUSTMENT (Exact Settings)

After AI enhancement, import audio into BandLab and apply these:

🔹 Compressor (TecLab BA-2A)

Gain: 62
Squeeze: 65
Mode: Compress

🔹 Multi Filter

Filter Type: Highpass
Frequency: 120 Hz
Resonance: 2.0
Gain: 0.0 dB

🔹 EQ3-M (Equalizer)

Low: -11.9 dB
Mid: +11.9 dB
High: +11.6 dB
Mid Sweep: 150 Hz

Save this as your own preset so next time you can apply in one click.

After this, export audio and use directly in your video.

Result:
✔ Noise reduced
✔ Voice clearer
✔ Studio-like feel

🔥 Like & Subscribe for more honest creator tips.
💬 Comment which phone you use for recording.

#nomic

title: Small Channels Ki Sabse Badi Galti 😱 (Maine Bhi Ki Thi)
description:
Kuch din pehle maine ek video upload ki —11 minute ki, full planning, editing sab kuch perfect. YouTube ne us video ko 11,000 impressions diye. Mujhe laga ab toh viral 🔥

👉 Reality check: Sirf 176 clicks CTR sirf 1.6% Aur average view duration sirf 1–1.5 minute

Tab mujhe samajh aaya — ❌ Main YouTube pe bahut badi galtiyan kar raha tha.

Is video me maine exact wahi galtiyan explain ki hain jo: Small channels ki growth ko maar deti hain CTR ko low kar deti hain Audience ko first 30 seconds me bhaga deti hain Aur creators ko demotivate kar deti hain

👉 Ye video theory nahi hai 👉 Ye real analytics + real experiment hai

🚨 Is video me tum seekhoge: ✔ Thumbnail & title ka CTR pe real impact ✔ 1.6% CTR ka matlab kya hota hai ✔ First 30 seconds boring hue toh kya hota hai ✔ YouTube hook kaise banana chahiye (2026 logic) ✔ SEO ka practical use (search + browse) ✔ Analytics kaise read karni chahiye ✔ Demotivation se kaise bahar nikle

Ye video chhote creators ke liye hai jo: 50–500 subscribers pe stuck hain Views nahi aa rahe Aur seriously YouTube grow karna chahte hain

📌 Ye ek live experiment hai. 24–48 hours baad main comments me update dunga ki: CTR, retention aur impressions ka result kya aaya.

Agar tum bhi YouTube seriously le rahe ho — 👉 end tak dekho 👉 comment me batao tum kaunsi galti kar rahe ho

👍 Like | 💬 Comment | 🔔 Subscribe Keep creating. Keep improving. 🚀

title: I Created AI Animated Shorts In 1 Min That Go VIRAL in 2025!
description:
#youtubeshorts  #animatedshorts  #viralshorts 

I Created AI Animated Shorts In 1 Min That Go VIRAL in 2025!

In this video I show my exact step-by-step process  I used ChatGPT + Meta AI to generate AI animated Shorts, I share the exact prompts I used, and I show how I edit and polish the Short for maximum replays and clicks. If you want viral shorts without a big PC or animator skills, this is the exact workflow I used.

What you’ll get in this video:
• Full prompt examples for ChatGPT (idea → script → shot list)
• How I used Meta AI to generate animated clips and the outputs to expect
• Two fast methods to edit & loop the Short for replays (final polish, sound layering, thumbnail tips)

Why this works in 2025: YouTube and Shorts editors now support faster in-app AI generation and new Short editing features, so text→video workflows actually scale. 

PROMPT : 
I want to create a short story-type video for YouTube Shorts using an AI video generator. So, write scene-by-scene prompts so that the AI generates the video for my story, scene by scene. For all the scenes, keep a consistent cinematic look with good camera angles, and make sure the main character's remains the same throughout.

Scene 1 : ...........
Scene 2 : ...........
..................

✋ If this helped  smash LIKE, SUBSCRIBE, and COMMENT which animation style I should make next (cartoon, anime, 3D loop).
